ns0:entry.ns0:title: WordPress/gutenberg
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/WordPress/gutenberg
Language: javascript
The Block Editor project for WordPress and beyond. Plugin is available from the official repository.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: datawhalechina/easy-vibe
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/datawhalechina/easy-vibe
Language: javascript
💻 vibe coding 2026 | Your first modern Coding course for beginners to master step by step.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: decolua/9router
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/decolua/9router
Language: javascript
Unlimited FREE AI coding. Connect Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Cline, Copilot, Antigravity to FREE Claude/GPT/Gemini via 40+ providers. Auto-fallback, RTK -40% tokens, never hit limits.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hotheadhacker/no-as-a-service
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hotheadhacker/no-as-a-service
Language: javascript
No-as-a-Service (NaaS) is a simple API that returns a random rejection reason. Use it when you need a realistic excuse, a fun “no,” or want to simulate being turned down in style.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jo-inc/camofox-browser
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jo-inc/camofox-browser
Language: javascript
Stealth headless browser for AI agents — bypass Cloudflare, bot detection, and anti-scraping. Drop-in Puppeteer/Playwright replacement.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: justlovemaki/AIClient2API
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/justlovemaki/AIClient2API
Language: javascript
Simulates Gemini CLI, Antigravity, Codex, Grok, and Kiro client requests, compatible with the OpenAI API. It supports thousands of Gemini model requests per day and offers free use of the built-in Claude model in Kiro. Easily connect to any client via the API, making AI development more efficient!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: poloclub/transformer-explainer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/poloclub/transformer-explainer
Language: javascript
Transformer Explained Visually: Learn How LLM Transformer Models Work with Interactive Visualization

ns0:entry.ns0:title: sgoudelis/ground-station
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/sgoudelis/ground-station
Language: javascript
Ground Station is all-in-one satellite monitoring suite

ns0:entry.ns0:title: songquanpeng/one-api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/songquanpeng/one-api
Language: javascript
LLM API 管理 & 分发系统，支持 OpenAI、Azure、Anthropic Claude、Google Gemini、DeepSeek、字节豆包、ChatGLM、文心一言、讯飞星火、通义千问、360 智脑、腾讯混元等主流模型，统一 API 适配，可用于 key 管理与二次分发。单可执行文件，提供 Docker 镜像，一键部署，开箱即用。LLM API management & key redistribution system, unifying multiple providers under a single API. Single binary, Docker-ready, with an English UI.
